this_issue: A new cohort of **Beyond the Prompt** opens June 9th. Limited number of seats.

rows.title: Beyond the Prompt
rows.notes: An extension of the newsletter. Move from basic prompting to automated agentic workflows. Next cohort starts June 9th, 2026.

rows.title: The Drop In Newsletter
rows.notes: Each issue covers one idea at the intersection of flow state science, attention design, and how to work with AI without losing your cognitive edge.

rows.title: Memoir of a Machine
rows.notes: A prequel of sorts to Human Traits. First draft in the first half of the year; publishing later in 2026.

rows.title: A Return to Analog
rows.notes: A vinyl collection and management service. Notes from the listening room.
